content.en:
"Finally, these Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak demon seeds have been killed!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Immediately, he found the Xuanwu Demon Crystal ore and other Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials on these demon seeds, and he gained a lot.

"It's better to kill these powerful demon seeds, and the harvest will be greater!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

After that, he sent a replica body to send the resources away.

......

The years passed.

Ye Tian was constantly looking for the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Ore, as well as killing with some Demon Seeds.

However.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered another high-level demon seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and was killed by the other party.

But not long after, a great battle broke out between the high-ranking Eternal Realm God Realm in this realm.

Before you know it, billions of solstice years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian completely gave up on this boundary rift, because it was already difficult for him to find the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Ore again, and he entered here too often, and the copy body fell many times, if he continued, the demon seeds would catch him to study and study.

Therefore, he still kept a low profile and withdrew from here for the time being.

Moreover, he had already collected a lot of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Ore over the years, which was enough to raise his Eternal Dao Seed to his current limit, so as to condense the fifth Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit.

......

Terran Holy Country.

Ye Tian returned here, and then began to refine those Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal ores with all his might.

Of course, in the years before him, there were also replica bodies that were refining, and he had been cultivating, but in just a few billion years to the Dao Era, it was naturally impossible to raise the Eternal Dao Species to the limit.

He estimated that he would probably need about 50 billion Dao Era years before he could raise the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit.

In addition, Ye Tian also handed over a part of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material to his wife and children, so that they could refine the Eternal Dao Seed and impact the Eternal Realm Divine Realm mid-level cultivation as soon as possible, so that they could have strong enough strength and be able to deal with more situations.

Ten billion to the Dao Era!

20 billion to the Dao Era!

Unconsciously, the 50 billion Dao Era years have passed.

During this period, the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit gave birth to two.

This time, he was going to use an Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit to help him condense the fifth Eternal Realm Spirit.

"The Eternal Dao Seed has been raised to the limit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately.

He began to cultivate the fifth Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, the Heavenly Flame Turtle, which was a defensive perfection-level Eternal Realm Spirit, and once he practiced it, his own defense would become extremely powerful.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian took out all kinds of resources that could help break through, many resources such as the Realm Spirit Dark Flower, the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, and the Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, which was enough to make his success rate as high as more than seventy percent.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian began to condense the Heavenly Profound Turtle Realm Spirit, and the unimaginably powerful Eternal Dao Species was being drawn from power to condense the Heavenly Profound Turtle.

Gradually, the Tianyan Xuan Turtle appeared a phantom, but it was condensed little by little.

And Ye Tian also swallowed those resources, such as the Realm Spirit Dark Flower and the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, in one go, and even absorbed some Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, which also had some effect on him.

A large amount of resources were refined by him, and the Tianyan Xuan Tortoise was naturally becoming more and more condensed.

Compared with other realm gods, every time he broke through, he was close to death, and compared to the long years of weakness, he was almost not weak.

Rumble!!!

After the Tianyan Xuangui Realm Spirit was condensed, the Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Technique naturally awakened.

【Tenyan Xuan Tortoise Shell】

As soon as Ye Tian's mind moved, this perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique was urged. []

In an instant, his body was covered with a layer of Tianyan Xuan tortoise shell, which was perfectly integrated with his body, and he couldn't see through the turtle shell at all, but if you look closely, you will find that his skin has dense tortoise shell lines, but the color and breath are the same as his body, so he can't feel it, only when he really bears the attack, can he find this set of Tianyan Xuan tortoise shell.

Next.

Ye Tian asked the other replica bodies to attack his body, using the Tianyan Xuan tortoise shell to defend himself.

As a result, he easily blocked the attack.

"It's a very good defense against the Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, in this way, my life-saving ability is even stronger!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

After this breakthrough, Ye Tian's physical strength has far surpassed the past, and the Eternal Dao Seed is also transforming, and his strength and cultivation are constantly skyrocketing, which is no longer comparable to the past.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian was still recovering the Eternal Dao Seed, using the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Material to improve his cultivation and strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed.

This period of time is also the stage when his strength skyrockets rapidly.

Time flies.

Another billions of solstice years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed had already passed the period of rapid ascension, and his cultivation was naturally stable.

At this moment, he was already a true Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse who had condensed the five Eternal Realm Spirits.

"With my current strength, I may be able to compete with the high-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

Not only did he improve, but his wife and children also condensed the fourth Eternal Realm Spirit during this period of time, and their cultivation broke through to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, which was also the help of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Substance.

If it weren't for these Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances, they would not have been able to break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level cultivation so quickly.

But soon, Ye Tian discovered a problem.

"The Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Material has weakened a lot now, and if I want to raise my current Eternal Dao Species to the limit, I need a lot of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Material!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, as long as it is useful, no matter how much Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material is needed, he will have to collect it!

Treasures like the Eternal Demon Pillar and the Chilin Ancient Spear have no effect on him now, and can only be reduced to pure weapons, with no other effect.

"Sure enough, the higher the cultivation, a lot of resources are useless to me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Boundary seams.

Ye Tian came to this place containing the Xuandevouring Demon Crystal material again, he was going to find the Xuandevouring Demon Crystal ore again, if he could find a large amount of Xuandevouring Demon Crystal material, then he might be able to raise his Eternal Dao Seed to the limit as soon as possible.

But this time, he was going to attack the demon seed to plunder the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance.
